name: Dealing with Employer Surveillance in Claims

mainEntity.name: Employer surveillance during workers' comp: legal in Cottonwood Heights?
mainEntity.text: Employer surveillance during workers' comp: legal in Cottonwood Heights?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, legal if public areas; cannot trespass or harass.

suggestedAnswer.text: Video to dispute claims; know rights. Don't exaggerate symptoms. Lawyer counters biased footage in hearings.

description: Yes, legal if public areas; cannot trespass or harass.
